sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sihna kuam gal khat ah khua lian pi khat om hi,
Minthanna te kigen khin zolo, maison
Tua mun ah ni tum lo, Sing teh te vul ngeilo,
Tua Pasian kham khuapi hoih sungah.
Tua mun ah (tua mun ah ni tum lo,)
Ni tum lo (tua mun ah ni tum lo,)
Singteh te (sing teh te sing teh te) vul ngei lo (vul ngei lo).
Tua mun ah thuman mi' maitang Topan en ding,
Tua Pasian Kham khuapi hoih sungah.
Tua mun ihit kumpi Hong Tan Pa Topa om,
Thu man mi te'n lungdamon en uh hi.
Tua mun ah thuman mi-te aksi bang tang ding,
Tua Pasian kham khuapi hoih sung ah.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Singlamteh phung ih tutpih khitsa kha khempeuh,
Tuu buk sung ih tutsa tuu khempeuh,
Lukhu zepna ding suang manpha bang kikem hi,
